parameters.query: INSERT INTO eventos (event_hash, event_uuid, timestamp_evento, eventid, session_id, sensor, src_ip, src_port, username, password, command_input, url, shasum, raw_event) VALUES ('{{$json.event_hash}}', {{$json.event_uuid ? "'" + $json.event_uuid + "'" : 'NULL'}}, {{$json.timestamp_evento ? "'" + $json.timestamp_evento + "'" : 'NULL'}}, {{$json.eventid ? "'" + $json.eventid + "'" : 'NULL'}}, {{$json.session_id ? "'" + $json.session_id + "'" : 'NULL'}}, {{$json.sensor ? "'" + $json.sensor + "'" : 'NULL'}}, {{$json.src_ip ? "'" + $json.src_ip + "'" : 'NULL'}}, {{$json.src_port || 'NULL'}}, {{$json.username ? "'" + $json.username + "'" : 'NULL'}}, {{$json.password ? "'" + $json.password + "'" : 'NULL'}}, {{$json.command_input ? "'" + $json.command_input.replaceAll("'", "''") + "'" : 'NULL'}}, {{$json.url ? "'" + $json.url + "'" : 'NULL'}}, {{$json.shasum ? "'" + $json.shasum + "'" : 'NULL'}}, '{{$json.raw_event.toJsonString().replaceAll("'", "''")}}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (event_hash) DO NOTHING;
